nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 甘肃省
nodes.summary: 甘肃省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括朱鹮、绿尾虹雉、点斑林鸽等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 棕背黑头鸫
nodes.summary: 棕背黑头鸫（White-backed thrush，学名 Turdus kessleri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点。

links.key: bird-棕背黑头鸫-7ca54181__distributed_in__loc-中华人民共和国-025fceab
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is primarily resident or a short-distance altitudinal migrant, found in central China in Gansu, Qinghai, Sichuan, eastern Tibet, and northwestern Yunnan, and also a scarce winter visitor in Bhutan, northeasternmost India (Arunachal Pradesh and Sikkim), and eastern Nepal. It breeds in alpine scrub on rocky sites at altitudes of 3600–4500 metres, and descends down to 2100 metres, rarely to 1500 metres, in winter. It is a large thrush, 28 cm long (same size as a mistle thrush)
